Rarity: RARE New Item Medium Cluster Jewel Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}AfflictionNotableSleeplessSentries Prefix: {range:0.5}AfflictionNotableAncestralEcho Suffix: None Suffix: {range:1}AfflictionJewelSmallPassivesGrantDex2 Cluster Jewel Skill: affliction_totem_damage Cluster Jewel Node Count: 4 LevelReq: 54 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Adds 4 Passive Skills {crafted}1 Added Passive Skill is a Jewel Socket {crafted}Added Small Passive Skills grant: 12% increased Totem Damage Added Small Passive Skills also grant: +5 to Dexterity 1 Added Passive Skill is Ancestral Echo 1 Added Passive Skill is Sleepless Sentries

Input.name: customMods
Input.string: Intelligence Nerf: 1% reduced energy shield per 10 intelligence Aul Ascendancy Buff: Determination has 50% increased aura effect
